creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
According to my notes, I have removed the "ipv6_ipv4mapping" option from my rc.conf in May 2013 after the manual installation of unreal ircd got updated to 3.2.10.1.

So for me this is not an issue any more. Maybe after now more then a decade software does properly support IPv6 and this mapping is not needed any more.
